HomePage.tagline: Plain-language translations of Israeli bureaucratic letters

SignIn.title: Sign in to Tachles
SignIn.betaWarning: Tachles is in private beta. You'll need an email invitation to access the app.
SignIn.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.
SignIn.notInvitedError: This email isn't on the beta invite list. Contact us to request access.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to the Tachles beta
Onboarding.intro: Before you continue, please read and accept the following:
Onboarding.consent1: Tachles is an early beta, not a finished product.
Onboarding.consent2: The privacy architecture described in our privacy policy has not yet been audited by an external security firm.
Onboarding.consent3: I will not use the beta to translate documents containing information I would be very uncomfortable having leaked.
Onboarding.acceptCheckbox: I have read and agree to the beta terms above.

NotInvited.title: Tachles is invite-only
NotInvited.message: Sorry — this email isn't on our beta invite list. We're running a small private beta while we build out the product. To request access, contact us at hello@tachles.help.

Dashboard.placeholder: Your translation tools will appear here starting day 7 of the build.
